title: 我每天做什么
prompt_en: Practice daily habits with action verbs like eat drink and go to school.
prompt_zh: 练习用一般动词描述日常习惯：吃、喝、去上学。
description: 掌握I eat/drink/go的肯定句和don't否定句。
knowledge_points: 一般动词 习惯 肯定句 否定句
teaching_markdown:
## 核心句型
- I eat breakfast every morning.
- I drink coffee in the morning.
- I go to school every day.
## 否定句
I don't + 动词原形：I don't eat meat.

title: 我的日常动作
prompt_en: Practice common daily actions like read watch play and study.
prompt_zh: 练习日常动作：看书、看电视、玩、学习。
description: 掌握read/watch/play/study等常用动词用法。
knowledge_points: 日常动作 动词 时间表达
teaching_markdown:
## 常用动作动词
- read：I read books at night.
- watch：I watch TV after dinner.
- play：I play football on weekends.
- study：I study English every day.

title: 起床到出门
prompt_en: Practice morning routine phrases like take a shower and wash face.
prompt_zh: 练习起床洗漱到出门的表达。
description: 掌握起床到出门的日常表达。
knowledge_points: 起床 洗漱 出门
teaching_markdown:
## 起床到出门
- I get up at 7 o'clock.
- I take a shower in the morning.
- I leave for work at 8.
注意：get up和wake up的区别。

title: 晚上做什么
prompt_en: Practice evening activities like reading and watching TV.
prompt_zh: 练习晚上日常活动：看书、看电视、睡觉。
description: 掌握晚上活动表达和频率。
knowledge_points: 晚上 阅读 电视 睡觉
teaching_markdown:
## 晚上活动
- I read books at night.
- I watch TV after dinner.
- I go to bed at 11 pm.
after dinner表示晚饭后。

title: 周末活动
prompt_en: Practice talking about weekend activities like relaxing and visiting family.
prompt_zh: 练习描述周末活动：放松、看望家人、出去玩。
description: 掌握周末活动表达。
knowledge_points: 周末 放松 看望 外出
teaching_markdown:
## 周末活动
- I relax on weekends.
- I visit my grandparents on Sundays.
- I hang out with friends on Saturday.
I do my homework after school.

title: 我喜欢…
prompt_en: Practice expressing likes with like love and enjoy.
prompt_zh: 练习表达喜好：like/love/enjoy。
description: 掌握like/love表达喜好。
knowledge_points: like + 名词 / like to do
teaching_markdown:
## 喜好表达
- I like coffee.
- I like to read books.
- I love music.
like < love程度递进

title: 我想要…
prompt_en: Practice expressing wants needs with want need and would like.
prompt_zh: 练习表达想要和需要：want/need/would like。
description: 掌握want/need/would like表达需求。
knowledge_points: want need would like
teaching_markdown:
## 想要和需要
- I want a new phone.
- I want to learn Spanish.
- I would like some water.
- I need some help.
- I need to go now.
want/would like/need后可接名词或to do。

title: 我有什么
prompt_en: Practice talking about possession with have.
prompt_zh: 练习用have谈论拥有什么。
description: 掌握have的肯定/否定/疑问形式。
knowledge_points: 拥有 have 疑问句 否定句
teaching_markdown:
## have 的三种形式
- 肯定：I have a brother. / I have two cats.
- 否定：I don't have a car.
- 疑问：Do you have a pen? — Yes, I do.

title: 我不喜欢…
prompt_en: Practice expressing dislikes with don't like and hate.
prompt_zh: 练习表达不喜欢：don't like/hate。
description: 掌握don't like表达不喜欢。
knowledge_points: 不喜欢 don't like
teaching_markdown:
## 不喜欢表达
- I don't like cold weather.
- 注意：don't like后面接名词或动名词。
- I can speak English.
- Can I go now?

title: 我的能力和意愿
prompt_en: Practice talking about ability with can.
prompt_zh: 练习用can表达能力和意愿。
description: 掌握can表达能力和请求许可。
knowledge_points: can 能力 许可
teaching_markdown:
## Can的用法
- 能力：I can speak English.
- 请求许可：Can I go now?
- 回答：Yes, you can. / No, you can't.

title: 几点起床
prompt_en: Practice talking about daily schedule with time expressions.
prompt_zh: 练习用时间表达描述每日作息时间。
description: 掌握at + 时间表达作息。
knowledge_points: 日程 时间 at
teaching_markdown:
## 时间表达
- I get up at 7 o'clock.
- I have breakfast at 7.
- I have lunch at 12.
- I come home at 6 pm.
- I go to bed at 11 pm.
at + 具体时间点。

title: 上学/上班
prompt_en: Practice talking about going to school or work.
prompt_zh: 练习表达上学/上班的行程。
description: 掌握go to / leave for等表达。
knowledge_points: 上学 上班 go to leave for
teaching_markdown:
## 上学/上班
- I leave for work at 8.
- I go to work by bus.
- I take the subway to school.
- I come to school early.
leave for = 出发去某地。

title: 放学/下班后
prompt_en: Practice talking about after school or after work activities.
prompt_zh: 练习描述放学/下班后的活动。
description: 掌握after school/work表达。
knowledge_points: 放学 下班 after
teaching_markdown:
## 放学/下班后
- I come home at 6 pm.
- I stay at home on Sundays.
- I do my homework after school.
on Sundays = 每个周日。

title: 交通方式
prompt_en: Practice talking about transportation by bus bike or subway.
prompt_zh: 练习用by/take表达交通方式。
description: 掌握交通方式表达：by bus / take the subway。
knowledge_points: 交通 by take
teaching_markdown:
## 交通方式
- I go to work by bus.
- I take the subway to school.
- I walk to school.
by+交通工具，take the+交通工具。

title: 时间规划
prompt_en: Practice planning schedule with wait for and look for.
prompt_zh: 练习用wait for和look for表达等待和寻找。
description: 掌握wait for/look for等短语动词。
knowledge_points: 等待 寻找 计划
teaching_markdown:
## 时间规划
- I wait for the bus at the stop.
- I look for my keys.
- I come to school on time.
wait for + 人/物，look for + 物。

title: 我想买…
prompt_en: Practice saying what you want to buy.
prompt_zh: 练习表达想买什么。
description: 掌握I want to buy表达购物意愿。
knowledge_points: 购物 想买 buy
teaching_markdown:
## 我想买
- I want to buy a new shirt.
- I need to go shopping this weekend.
want to buy + 物品，need to go + 地点。

title: 问价格
prompt_en: Practice asking prices with How much.
prompt_zh: 练习用How much问价格。
description: 掌握How much is/are问价格。
knowledge_points: 价格 How much
teaching_markdown:
## 问价格
- How much is this? — It's 50 yuan.
- How much are these? — They're 100 yuan.
is+单数，are+复数。

title: 试穿与挑选
prompt_en: Practice trying on clothes and choosing sizes.
prompt_zh: 练习试穿和挑选尺码颜色。
description: 掌握try on和size表达。
knowledge_points: 试穿 挑选 尺码
teaching_markdown:
## 试穿与挑选
- Can I try this on? — Sure.
- Do you have this in a smaller size?
- This is too expensive.
- I'll take this one.
try on可分开：try it on。

title: 天气与活动
prompt_en: Practice describing weather and suggesting activities.
prompt_zh: 练习描述天气和提议活动。
description: 掌握天气描述和Let's提议。
knowledge_points: 天气 活动 Let's
teaching_markdown:
## 天气与活动
- It's sunny today. Let's go out!
- What's the weather like?
- I go out for a walk every evening.
- Let's go to the park.
It's+天气词，Let's+动词。

title: 出行计划
prompt_en: Practice talking about travel plans and transportation.
prompt_zh: 练习用I walk / I take描述出行方式。
description: 掌握出行方式表达。
knowledge_points: 出行 计划 方式
teaching_markdown:
## 出行计划
- I walk to school. It's not far.
- I need an umbrella. It's raining.
- I take the bus to work.
注意交通工具前用the。

title: 点餐
prompt_en: Practice ordering food at a restaurant.
prompt_zh: 练习在餐厅点餐。
description: 掌握点餐用语：menu / order / recommend。
knowledge_points: 餐厅 点餐 菜单
teaching_markdown:
## 点餐流程
- Can I have the menu please?
- I'd like to order a pizza and a salad.
- What do you recommend?
- I'll have the same.
礼貌点餐用I'd like to...。

title: 评价食物
prompt_en: Practice evaluating food with delicious and tasty.
prompt_zh: 练习评价食物：delicious/tasty/sweet。
description: 掌握评价食物的表达。
knowledge_points: 评价 食物 味道
teaching_markdown:
## 评价食物
- The food is delicious! I love it.
- Can I have the bill please?
- It's 120 yuan.
delicious比good程度更强。

title: 打电话与发消息
prompt_en: Practice making phone calls and sending messages.
prompt_zh: 练习打电话和发消息。
description: 掌握call/send/text等通讯动词。
knowledge_points: 电话 消息 通讯
teaching_markdown:
## 通讯表达
- I call my mom every day.
- I send messages to my friends on WeChat.
- Can you call me back later?
call后直接加人。

title: 约见面
prompt_en: Practice making plans to meet someone.
prompt_zh: 练习约定见面时间和地点。
description: 掌握Let's meet at表达约见。
knowledge_points: 约定 见面 meet
teaching_markdown:
## 约见面
- Let's meet at the coffee shop at 3 pm.
- I'm on my way. I'll be there in 10 minutes.
meet at + 地点 + at + 时间。

title: 迟到与道歉
prompt_en: Practice apologizing for being late.
prompt_zh: 练习迟到道歉和早晨习惯表达。
description: 掌握道歉表达和日常习惯。
knowledge_points: 迟到 道歉 习惯
teaching_markdown:
## 迟到和习惯
- Sorry I'm late. The traffic was bad.
- I check my phone first thing in the morning.
道歉时解释原因。

title: 日常指令
prompt_en: Practice giving daily commands and instructions.
prompt_zh: 练习日常指令表达：肯定祈使句。
description: 掌握肯定祈使句基本结构。
knowledge_points: 祈使句 指令 命令
teaching_markdown:
## 日常指令
- Sit down please.
- Open the door please.
- Please be quiet.
- Come here. Go there.
祈使句以动词原形开头。

title: 否定祈使句
prompt_en: Practice negative commands with Don't.
prompt_zh: 练习否定祈使句：Don't + 动词。
description: 掌握Don't否定祈使句结构。
knowledge_points: 否定祈使句 Don't
teaching_markdown:
## 否定祈使句
- Don't worry.
- Don't be late for class.
- Don't forget to bring your book.
Don't + 动词原形。

title: Let's提议
prompt_en: Practice making suggestions with Let's.
prompt_zh: 练习Let's提议和Let's not否定提议。
description: 掌握Let's + 动词和Let's not结构。
knowledge_points: Let's 提议 建议
teaching_markdown:
## Let's提议
- Let's go!
- Let's meet at 3 o'clock.
- Let's not wait any longer.
Let's = Let us，表示建议。

title: 提醒与建议
prompt_en: Practice giving reminders and advice with Be and Please.
prompt_zh: 练习提醒和建议的表达。
description: 掌握Be + 形容词和礼貌提醒。
knowledge_points: 提醒 建议 Be careful
teaching_markdown:
## 提醒与建议
- Be careful!
- Please be on time.
- Don't forget to call me.
Be + 形容词表示'要...'。

title: 综合运用
prompt_en: Practice comprehensive use of imperative sentences.
prompt_zh: 综合练习祈使句的各种用法。
description: 综合运用各种祈使句表达。
knowledge_points: 祈使句 综合 运用
teaching_markdown:
## 综合运用
- Let's go out for dinner tonight.
- Don't forget to call me when you arrive.
- Be careful and don't be late.
将肯定祈使句、否定祈使句和Let's结合使用。
